Faculty of Art, Design and Architecture

Interior Architecture and Environmental Design

MENU

This discipline determines all the anatomical, ergonomic, psychological, economic, sociological and cultural data of the users and produces comfortable, time-saving, original, functional, aesthetic, personal or corporate identity-specific solutions in the light of technological developments, in the relationship of floors, walls, ceilings of spaces. lighting, textiles, accessories etc. It covers the design with all its equipment. Students studying in these branches deal with human, space and furniture relations with disciplines including functionality, construction, form, color and material.

This program contains consists of subjects determined in order to comprehend the basic design principles in private and public spaces and to gain the identity of a unique designer. With the programs prepared for the development of intellectual and creative identity, the necessary environment is provided for the training of interior architects who are equipped to compete on a global platform.
